_comment: Canonical --o2-* -> --color-* mapping for O2_TOKEN_MIGRATION_PLAN.md. Bucket A/B/C entries have a real modern alias already defined in lib/styles/tokens/{semantic,dark,component}.css (Stage 1) and are safe to codemod (Stage 3). Bucket D entries are handled separately (Stage 4, renamespacing family-by-family) and are NOT in this map. `skip` entries are legacy tokens intentionally left un-migrated pending a design call (see notes) -- do not codemod their refs.

bucketB._comment: Runtime-computed by utils/theme.ts. --o2-theme-color/--o2-dark-theme-color consolidated into one token (theme.ts already set both to the same value in dark mode).

bucketC._comment: Semantic/status colors, also runtime-set by utils/theme.ts for custom triadic themes (e.g. Crimson Ink).

bucketD_labelChip._comment: Renamespaced in Stage 4 (family-by-family). Real values now live under --color-label-chip-* in semantic.css/dark.css; --o2-label-chip-* are pure aliases.

skip._comment: Intentionally left un-migrated -- do NOT auto-codemod these refs.
skip.--o2-primary-color: Dark flips 600->400 shade; no single static modern token. Needs a design call (map to --color-text-link, or add --color-accent). Already a reverse-alias to --color-primary-600/-400 at the definition site.
skip.--o2-card-bg: Light value is semi-transparent rgba(255,255,255,0.8); --color-surface-base is opaque. Changes translucency over gradients (95 usages). Needs a visual check before mapping.
skip.--o2-card-bg-solid: Same design-call as --o2-card-bg (kept consistent with it); dark mode already aliases to --color-surface-base.
skip.--o2-border-color: Always paired with --o2-card-bg in 'glass card' Tailwind patterns (border border-(--o2-border-color) alongside bg-(--o2-card-bg)) across 109 files. It's a semi-transparent black/white overlay (rgba(0,0,0,.12) / rgba(255,255,255,.40)), not a solid color like --color-border-default -- aliasing it alone (or without --o2-card-bg) would visibly mismatch the paired border+bg glass-card look. Resolve together with --o2-card-bg's design call.

bucketD_note: Domain data-viz palettes (label-chip, span-kind, field-type, status, wildcard, trace, json, service-health, latency, severity) are renamespaced separately in Stage 4 -- see O2_TOKEN_MIGRATION_PLAN.md §5 Bucket D and Stage 4 in this repo's migration work.
